I Don't Need A Guillotine For My Revolution!

ActionFantasyRomance
#Conspiracies#Romance#Male Protagonist#Regression#Knights
I died on the wrong side of history, a nobleman executed by revolutionaries.

Sent back in time, I now know the truth: the only way to survive the coming rebellion is to make sure it succeeds.

To save my own head, I must join the very cause I once condemned.
Start Reading
258
Chapters
129,574
Views
258

Premium

I Don't Need A Guillotine For My Revolution!

ActionFantasyRomance
#Conspiracies#Romance#Male Protagonist#Regression#Knights
I died on the wrong side of history, a nobleman executed by revolutionaries.

Sent back in time, I now know the truth: the only way to survive the coming rebellion is to make sure it succeeds.

To save my own head, I must join the very cause I once condemned.
